Product User Manual for INSITU_GLO_PHY_UV_DISCRETE_MY_013_044 
 
 
 
 
  
Contributors : H. Etienne, Christine Boone, Patricia Zunino, N. Verbrugge, E. Reyes, P. 
Rotllán, A. Rubio, L. Solabarrieta, L. Corgnati, C. Mantovani, J. Mader, Thierry Carval, 
Corentin Guyot 
 
Approval Date : November 2025 
 
For Global Ocean-Delayed Mode in-situ 
Observations of surface (drifters and HFR), 
surface and subsurface (Argo drift) and sub-
surface (vessel-mounted ADCPs, gliders) water 
velocity

Issue: 3.6 
PRODUCT USER MANUAL
